idempotencyKey.description: Internal idempotency fingerprint returned by the current service.

serverApiKey.description: Shown once; replaces the previous server key.

value.description: Comparison value; omitted for existence checks.

interactionSessionId.description: Optional preferred online session. If omitted, backend selects the most recently active session.

duplicate.description: True when the same Idempotency-Key was already processed.

info.description: CMS, integration, chat and realtime API for Lola AI Assistant
info.title: Lola Backend Platform

parameters.description: Client-generated key. Reuse it only when retrying the same send operation.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

parameters.description: Active guest interaction JWT proving ownership of the guest history.
parameters.name: X-Guest-Token
